syncR 0.1.0

syncR: Integrate and Coordinate Data Across the Circadia Lab Package Ecosystem

Source: R/syncR-package.R
syncR-package.Rd

syncR is the integrator and coordinator of the Circadia Lab R ecosystem. It pulls sociodemographic and questionnaire data from tallieR, sleep diary data from slumbR, and actigraphy-derived circadian metrics from zeitR into a single unified, participant-indexed database. syncR::sync() — pulling everything into alignment, just like the SCN does.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/circadia-bio/syncR

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/circadia-bio/syncR/issues
